name: vlm
methodology: vlm.describe_image() on a synthetic 512x384 PNG; window = lazy model load + inference (the user-facing wait); model evicted after. Cold load (no resident VLM) — co-resident-with-14B cost NOT measured here.

not_measured: GPU driver version (read from dxdiag / Device Manager; not introspectable here)
co-resident memory cost when other models are loaded alongside
subjective voice naturalness / visual answer quality
